status.next_allowed_action: Execute WU 3.1: add d3-force low-heat simulation, hybrid cold-start layout, and cached hand-drawn paths; verify with graph-engine simulation state tests.

new_dependency_whitelist_runtime: chokidar (only if fs.watch recursive proven unreliable; record evidence)
execution_rules.toolchain_devdeps_allowed: typescript/vite/tsx/concurrently and @types/* reusing workbench-pinned versions do NOT count as new dependencies
execution_rules.privacy_check_every_commit: git diff --cached must not contain /Users/ paths; never commit demo-KB generated graph-data/offline HTML

decision_log.evidence: rg over templates/graph-styles/wash/header.html, graph-wash.js, and graph-wash-helpers.js for d3/rough/script-loader terms only matched the graph-data JSON script tag; no d3 or rough runtime usage was found.
decision_log.consequence: Phase 6 can remove d3.min.js and rough.min.js from offline HTML packing if no later dependency appears; marked and DOMPurify remain outside this conclusion.

2_static_baseline_screenshots.summary: Workbench graph screenshots and legacy offline HTML baseline screenshot are committed for reviewer comparison. Codex does not self-certify final visual equivalence.

manual_acceptance.item: Static graph visual consistency against legacy offline HTML.
manual_acceptance.reason: Visual consistency is subjective per plan; screenshots are provided for the reviewer instead of Codex self-approval.

server and web workspace typechecks passed.

Original repository JS tests still passed with 116 tests.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed.

Old template helper files were left untouched. Migrated helper-related tests from tests/js into packages/graph-engine/test with the same test case counts.

work_units.name: 工作台视图壳 + /api/graph + rebuild + 对照截图

verification.command: curl/node API script against running dev server
verification.summary: Selected the stage4 demo KB, removed graph-data.json, confirmed GET /api/graph returned needsBuild, POST /api/graph/rebuild started rebuild, and a later GET returned 11 nodes and 24 edges.

verification.command: npx --no-install playwright screenshot with graph view storage state
verification.summary: Workbench graph rendered in dark mo-ye and light shan-shui themes; screenshots saved to p2-workbench-graph.png and p2-workbench-graph-light.png.
No-data state showed graph building UI; screenshot saved to p2-workbench-graph-building.png, then graph rebuilt back to 11 nodes and 24 edges.
All four Phase 2 evidence screenshots exist as 1440x900 PNG files, including the legacy offline HTML baseline.
server, web, and graph-engine workspace typechecks passed.
Web production build passed after ensuring the graph-engine workspace builds first; Vite reported only the existing large chunk warning.
92 graph-engine tests passed.
ESM, IIFE, and declaration outputs built successfully.
116 original repository JS tests passed.
All regression checks passed; cp emitted the known .git fsmonitor socket warning but exited successfully.

verification.command: git diff --cached --check; staged local-path scan; root package type check; scripts/build-graph-data.sh diff check
verification.summary: Staged whitespace check passed, no staged local absolute paths were present, root package.json still has no type field, and scripts/build-graph-data.sh was unchanged.

work_units.notes: Added the workbench graph main view, graph API/rebuild flow, SSE graph events, React graph shell, current-KB graph loading, theme following, demo screenshots, and a web prebuild step so the internal graph-engine dependency has declarations before web production builds. Demo KB generated files remain local and were not committed.
